arts.ttl: BREAKING: Mikel Arteta makes decision on Arsenal's new striker as Raheem Sterling pays price
arts.sum: Arsenal take on London rivals West Ham on Saturday afternoon amid an ongoing injury crisis and the Gunners have now revealed the side that will take on the Hammers

arts.ttl: Man United and Chelsea told the price tag of transfer target Liam Delap
arts.sum: Ipswich Town attacker Liam Delap, who has scored ten Premier League goals this season, is attracting attention from Premier League giants Manchester United and Chelsea. With Ipswich facing the threat of getting relegated from the top flight this season, they might find it difficult to keep Delap at the club amid interest from the bigger […] The post Man United and Chelsea told the price tag of transfer target Liam Delap appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Inside the secret Chelsea meeting at Cobham as Enzo Maresca sets clear target to over 100 people
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca has shed light on a large meeting with Chelsea staff members at Cobham "more than a month ago" to ask them to push until the end of the season and help qualify for the Champions League. Over a month ago, there was a meeting called by Maresca at Chelsea's training base - taking place in the canteen - in Cobham, where over 100 people were in attendance, including the kitchen staff, those in charge of preparing the kit and groundsmen.

arts.ttl: Man United and Chelsea ready to pay €75m for star Mourinho rates as “world-class”
arts.sum: Manchester United and Chelsea have been linked with a move for Victor Osimhen, who is currently on loan at Turkish club Galatasaray from Italian outfit Napoli. The 26-year-old Nigerian international was heavily linked with a move away from Napoli at the start of the season, and he ended up joining the Turkish club on loan. arts.ttl: Manager admits he’s text Chelsea boss Enzo Maresca about Conference League – Won’t be reunited afterall
arts.sum: Real Betis manager Manuel Pellegrini has admitted he sent a text to Chelea manager Enzo Maresca after the Europa Conference League draw on Friday. ABC Sevilla cover comments from the Betis boss, in which he joked he’s sent a text to his former assistant about the draw. arts.ttl: Arsenal, Chelsea and Tottenham ‘offering €100m’ for 11-goal Englishman
arts.sum: Arsenal, Chelsea and Tottenham are hoping to sign the Borussia Dortmund winger Jamie Gittens during the summer transfer window. All three clubs are keen on securing the signature of the 20-year-old attacker and they are offering €100 million in order to get the deal done. arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer news: Blues forwards to be offered Bayern Munich escape route?
arts.sum: Bayern Munich are reportedly still showing an interest in signing Chelsea forward Christopher Nkunku after failing to secure his services in the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: Louie Barry reveals Unai Emery instruction after sealing another Aston Villa transfer
arts.sum: Another loan, this time in the Championship, was on the cards, however, and Barry ultimately joined Hull City where he joined manager Ruben Selles, who he was impressed by when encountering former club Reading. Striker Louie Barry returned to Aston Villa from Stockport County in the January transfer window with breaking into the first-team firmly on his mind - but manager Unai Emery, for the time being, had other ideas.

arts.ttl: Chelsea willing to offer €50 million for La Liga ace who “can play several roles”
arts.sum: Chelsea are interested in signing the Atletico Madrid midfielder Pablo Barrios during the summer window. The 21-year-old has established himself as an important first-team player for Atletico Madrid and Chelsea are keen on securing his signature. According to a report from Fichajes, they would be willing to spend €50 million in order to get the […] The post Chelsea willing to offer €50 million for La Liga ace who “can play several roles” appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Chelsea to repeat transfer mistake in €100m LaLiga splurge
arts.sum: The latest name that Chelsea are looking at is Sevilla defender Loic Bade, according to Fijaches, who claim the Blues are about to splurge €100 million on LaLiga players . Chelsea have not got a good track record when it comes to signing centre-backs, so it should perhaps come as little surprise that Enzo Maresca’s side could be about to make another error when it comes to this area of the team.
